category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates, retrieves, and updates releases on GitLab; official GitLab docs identify it as the GitLab Release CLI tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitlab-release-cli; official GitLab docs title is GitLab Release CLI tool.
docs_sources: Official GitLab Docs has a dedicated Release CLI page; official GitLab project README is also linked from the source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab Docs describe release creation and release-cli usage in CI/CD.
